requests.prompt: Raw one-take product ad for Master Kong Iced Black Tea. The scene shows a simple indoor tabletop setup. Use one young adult, neutral friendly look, light as the only moving person or hand. Use the provided start frame as video conditioning; preserve the real product identity already visible in that frame and keep the same product throughout the shot. A single continuous shot of a light-wood tabletop against a plain beige wall. The Master Kong Iced Black Tea bottle from the reference stands upright at center on the table. The scene feels like a hot afternoon: warm, golden sunlight spreads across the wall and tabletop, with a slightly hazy amber tone. After a brief beat, a person enters the frame from the right. Their hand reaches in, picks up the bottle, and brings it to their mouth for a quick sip. As they drink, the overall scene smoothly shifts from warm amber to a cooler blue tone, as if the room’s temperature dropped: the wall and tabletop color temperature cools, the light becomes crisp and refreshing, and the person’s expression relaxes into a small relieved. Keep the same room and fixed camera for the whole shot, with one main subject, natural motion, and stable hands and product shape. Clean product-ad frame with only the main subject, the real product, natural props, and the visible scene.

image_inputs.description: Video start frame used as first-frame I2V conditioning by the video backend.
Product identity reference for optional start-frame image-edit generation. It is not sent to the video backend as a separate product-reference conditioning image.

creative_design.selected_category_reason: Exaggeration can turn the cooling benefit into a bold, single-shot lighting shift from hot to cool, keeping it playful and credible without needing complex liquids or VFX.

candidate_categories.reason: Strong visual contrast (warm-to-cool light) instantly communicates refreshment for a bottled tea in one simple, feasible shot.
candidate_categories.risk: If the lighting shift is too subtle, the exaggeration may feel unclear; ensure a noticeable but natural color temperature change.

candidate_categories.reason: Showing a person enjoying the drink in a summer moment communicates satisfaction and context.
candidate_categories.risk: Requires more set dressing and continuity; risk of clutter and weaker immediacy vs. a bold hook.

candidate_categories.reason: Close-ups of the bottle can look appetizing and brand-forward.
candidate_categories.risk: Fine details like condensation or label text may drift; less emotional impact than an exaggerated mood shift.

creative_design.selling_angle: Instant cool-down refreshment in the heat.
creative_design.visual_grammar: One-scene exaggerated mood switch: warm, sun-baked look flips to cool, blue tone during a single sip; tight person-and-product framing.
creative_design.proof_mechanism: Dramatic but plausible lighting and color-temperature shift from warm/orange to cool/blue as the sip happens.
creative_design.hook_or_opening: Bottle stands on a sun-warmed tabletop bathed in golden light, signaling a hot day.
creative_design.action_arc: A hand reaches in, grabs the bottle, takes a quick sip; as they sip, the scene’s lighting cools to blue and the person’s expression relaxes; they bring the bottle closer with the label facing camera.
creative_design.payoff: Cool-toned scene holds on the bottle near camera and a small satisfied nod from the person.
creative_design.feasibility_notes: Single locked camera, one subject, no pouring, no ice, no condensation micro-details. The only ‘exaggeration’ is an overall color-temperature and brightness shift, which is a simple, robust cue for open-source models.

metadata.overlay_text:
Opening (warm tone): Beat the heat
Payoff (cool tone): Cool in a sip
metadata.audio_direction: Music: light, sunny groove that shifts to a crisp, cool chime when the sip happens. SFX: a soft whoosh timed with the warm-to-cool lighting change. Performance: a subtle, satisfied ‘ahh’ on the exhale.
metadata.visual_prompt: A single continuous shot of a light-wood tabletop against a plain beige wall. The Master Kong Iced Black Tea bottle from the reference stands upright at center on the table. The scene feels like a hot afternoon: warm, golden sunlight spreads across the wall and tabletop, with a slightly hazy amber tone. After a brief beat, a person enters the frame from the right. Their hand reaches in, picks up the bottle, and brings it to their mouth for a quick sip. As they drink, the overall scene smoothly shifts from warm amber to a cooler blue tone, as if the room’s temperature dropped: the wall and tabletop color temperature cools, the light becomes crisp and refreshing, and the person’s expression relaxes into a small relieved smile. They lower the bottle slightly and bring it closer toward the camera with the label facing forward, holding it steady in the cool-toned light. The person gives a small satisfied nod while holding the bottle near the lens. The camera remains locked throughout, no added props or text in scene.

critic_expectation.purpose: Judge whether the raw video is a plausible product demo for Master Kong Iced Black Tea.
hard_requirements: single continuous raw video shot with steady one-take continuity

complete direct prompt: A single continuous shot of a light-wood tabletop against a plain beige wall. The Master Kong Iced Black Tea bottle from the reference stands upright at center on the table. The scene feels like a hot afternoon: warm, golden sunlight spreads across the wall.
physically plausible handling of the product by one main subject
soft_context: The shot may hint at this customer context: Hot days make you feel overheated and sluggish; many drinks don’t instantly feel cooling.
Focus the judgment on the requested product action, proof visibility, and one-take continuity.

Creative design expectation: ad_category=exaggerate; hook=Bottle stands on a sun-warmed tabletop bathed in golden light, signaling a hot day.; proof=Dramatic but plausible lighting and color-temperature shift from warm/orange to cool/blue as the sip happens.; payoff=Cool-toned scene holds on the bottle near camera and a small satisfied nod.

Expected subject and scene style from asset memory: One young adult, neutral friendly look, light to medium skin tone, natural appearance.; Plain light-colored short-sleeve T-shirt (no logos), casual summer style..
quality_checks: stable face, hands, objects, and camera motion
main product action is visible and easy to understand
visible product appearance stays consistent with the product reference image
ad_category intent is recognizable through the opening, action arc, proof mechanism, and payoff
